10 MCR_CMI MCR_CMI Medicare CMI Value for RUG Group CHAR 9 This field contains the Medicare Case Mix Index generated in the RUG calculation for this assessment by the state MDS system.
11 MCRCDST MCR_CODE_SET Medicare RUG CMI Set Used CHAR 3 This field contains the Medicare set code that was used in the RUG calcluation for this assessment by the staate MDS system.
